NutriMM.title: NutriM&M
NutriMM.description: Snap a photo of your food and get its nutritional value instantly.

HomePage.title: Nutrition in detail: from macros to micros.
HomePage.subtitle: Instantly discover the nutritional value of your meals. Just take a picture and let NutriM&M do the rest.
HomePage.cardSubtitle: Your journey to mindful eating starts here.

PortionsPage.title: Portion Estimation
PortionsPage.subtitle: Advanced mass estimation based on the Nutrition5k methodology. Analyze your entire plate at once.
PortionsPage.methodDescription: This tool calculates total weight and absolute calories based on the visual volume of the plate.

PortionResultCard.absoluteValuesNote: Total nutritional content for the entire portion.

ScanForm.uploaderHint: Drag & drop an image or click to upload

NutritionResultCard.handMethodNote: Method based on study PMC8115205 for quick visual estimation.

HistoryPage.title: Food History
HistoryPage.subtitle: Review your logged meals and track your daily progress.
HistoryPage.noHistorySubtitle: Start by scanning a food item to build your history.

DailySummary.title: Today's Summary
DailySummary.description: An overview of your nutrient intake for today.
DailySummary.hasLog: Click the button to generate today's summary.
DailySummary.noLog: Log some food to see your daily summary.

ManualEntryPage.title: Add Food Manually
ManualEntryPage.subtitle: Know the nutritional info? Log your food directly here. Perfect for items with a nutrition label.

FoodLog.loadError: Could not load your food history.
FoodLog.saveError: Could not save your food history.
FoodLog.removedToastDescription: The food item has been removed from your history.

Actions.imageRequired: Image must be a data URI
Actions.analysisError: AI could not analyze the image. Please try another one or enter manually.
Actions.extractionError: Identified as {foodItem}, but could not extract nutritional data. Try a clearer image.
Actions.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred during analysis.
Actions.noFoodItems: No food items provided for summary.
Actions.textAnalysisError: AI could not analyze the food name. Please try another one or enter manually.
Actions.foodNameRequired: Please enter a food name to analyze.
